source: Vibe Gate anti-patterns for Vibe UI execution checks

patterns.label: Default LLM indigo accent
patterns.bad: Uses #6366f1, #4f46e5, #818cf8, or #7c3aed as an unearned accent instead of the selected DESIGN.md palette.
patterns.fix: Replace the accent with a named color token from DESIGN.md, or document why the selected style explicitly supports it.
patterns.evidence: Matched a hardcoded default AI accent color.

patterns.label: Generic AI gradient
patterns.bad: Adds an arbitrary gradient, glow, neon, or glass effect that is not present in the selected design system.
patterns.fix: Use the selected DESIGN.md surface, border, and action color rules; keep gradients only when the source design documents them.
patterns.evidence: Matched gradient or effect utility classes.

patterns.label: Hardcoded color drift
patterns.bad: Introduces raw hex colors that do not appear in DESIGN.md.
patterns.fix: Replace raw values with DESIGN.md color tokens and reuse the same token for repeated roles.
patterns.evidence: Matched hex values outside the extracted DESIGN.md token set.

patterns.label: Emoji as UI icon
patterns.bad: Uses emoji as iconography, decoration, or product ornament without design-system permission.
patterns.fix: Use the project icon system, a real product asset, or plain text; keep emoji only if DESIGN.md explicitly allows it.
patterns.evidence: Matched Unicode emoji or symbol characters in UI code.

patterns.label: Invented metric or claim
patterns.bad: Uses 10x, 99.9%, 100k+, millions, or similar proof claims without evidence.
patterns.fix: Cite a real source, use a verified metric, or rewrite as neutral product copy.

patterns.label: Filler copy
patterns.bad: Ships placeholder text such as Lorem ipsum, your product, Acme, coming soon, or generic marketing filler.
patterns.fix: Write product-specific copy tied to the actual audience, workflow, and page goal.
patterns.evidence: Matched placeholder or generic copy markers.

patterns.label: Uppercase without tracking
patterns.bad: Uses uppercase text without explicit letter spacing or tracking.
patterns.fix: Add the selected style's tracking rule, or switch to sentence case.
patterns.evidence: Matched uppercase styling without letter-spacing or tracking.

patterns.label: Missing section identifiers
patterns.bad: Top-level sections are not labeled, making design review and iteration ambiguous.
patterns.fix: Add stable data-od-id values to top-level generated sections.
patterns.evidence: Matched section elements without data-od-id attributes.

patterns.label: Unsupported heavy shadow
patterns.bad: Adds heavy elevation that most selected DESIGN.md systems do not call for.
patterns.fix: Use the documented shadow token or reduce to a subtle border/shadow treatment.
patterns.evidence: Matched heavy shadow utility classes or large box-shadow values.

patterns.label: Radius drift
patterns.bad: Uses arbitrary large radii that conflict with the selected component system.
patterns.fix: Use the DESIGN.md radius scale consistently across cards, buttons, panels, and inputs.
patterns.evidence: Matched arbitrary rounded utilities or large border-radius values.

patterns.label: Unlabeled button
patterns.bad: Renders a button without accessible text or an aria-label.
patterns.fix: Add visible text or a precise aria-label that names the action.
patterns.evidence: Matched button elements without a detectable text label or aria-label.

patterns.label: Weak component structure
patterns.bad: The target does not look like reusable page or component code.
patterns.fix: Use semantic sections, repeated components, and explicit hierarchy before styling details.
patterns.evidence: Static scan found too few component/page structure signals.
